name: Leviathan Wakes
author: Kenoboi
bootlegger: The Cult Leader's ability reads: "Each night, you learn the alignment of one of your alive neighbors.  If all good players choose to join your cult, you become that alignment and your team wins."
The Pithag Heretic Jinx reads: "A Pit-Hag cannot create a Heretic." This also applies to Hermit.
If Riot is made drunk during day 3, Minions become Riot and the Riot activates as soon as Riot is sober.
